synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2411 Oracle Linux 8 kexec-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2411
description:
[2.0.31-1.0.4]
- Fix secure boot after updating to 2.0.31 [Orabug: 38576014]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2411

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2411.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
kexec-tools-2.0.31-1.0.4.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
kexec-tools-2.0.31-1.0.4.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/kexec-tools-2.0.31-1.0.4.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.0.31-1.0.4]
- Fix secure boot after updating to 2.0.31 [Orabug: 38576014]
